# services.swapspace

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.swapspace`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.swapspace.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Swapspace, a dynamic swap space manager. |
| `services.swapspace.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Any extra arguments to pass to swapspace |
| `services.swapspace.installWrapper` | `boolean` | This will add swapspace wrapped with the generated config, to environment.systemPackages |
| `services.swapspace.package` | `package` | The swapspace package to use. |
| `services.swapspace.settings` | `submodule` | Config file for swapspace. See the options here: <https://github.com/Tookmund/Swapspace/blob/master/swapspace.conf> |
| `services.swapspace.settings.buffer_elasticity` | `integer between 0 and 100 (both inclusive)` | Percentage of buffer space considered to be "free" |
| `services.swapspace.settings.cache_elasticity` | `integer between 0 and 100 (both inclusive)` | Percentage of cache space considered to be "free" |
| `services.swapspace.settings.cooldown` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Duration (roughly in seconds) of the moratorium on swap allocation that is instated if disk space runs out, or the cooldown time after a new swapfile is successfully allocated before swapspace will consider deallocating swap space again. The default cooldown period is about 10 minutes. |
| `services.swapspace.settings.freetarget` | `integer between 2 and 99 (both inclusive)` | Percentage of free space swapspace should aim for when adding swapspace. This should fall somewhere between lower_freelimit and upper_freelimit. |
| `services.swapspace.settings.lower_freelimit` | `integer between 0 and 99 (both inclusive)` | Lower free-space threshold: if the percentage of free space drops below this number, additional swapspace is allocated |
| `services.swapspace.settings.max_swapsize` | `string` | Greatest allowed size for individual swapfiles |
| `services.swapspace.settings.min_swapsize` | `string` | Smallest allowed size for individual swapfiles |
| `services.swapspace.settings.swappath` | `string` | Location where swapspace may create and delete swapfiles |
| `services.swapspace.settings.upper_freelimit` | `integer between 0 and 100 (both inclusive)` | Upper free-space threshold: if the percentage of free space exceeds this number, swapspace will attempt to free up swapspace |
